_publications._publicationTitle: The development of an artificial intelligence auto-segmentation tool for 3D volumetric analysis of vestibular schwannomas.

_contextSnippet: After the final testing stage, the final mean DICE score was 0.88 (range 0.74–0.93, standard deviation 0.04).
details: Used as primary metric for evaluating AI segmentation accuracy, with final mean score of 0.88 (range 0.74–0.93, SD 0.04)
